name: libbabeltrace1
title: libbabeltrace1
description:
Babeltrace conversion libraries
Babeltrace provides trace reading and writing libraries, as well as a trace
converter. Plugins can be created for any trace format to allow its conversion
to/from any other supported format.
.
This package provides the babeltrace trace reading and conversion library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libbabeltrace1 because Babeltrace conversion libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libbabeltrace1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libbabeltrace1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libbabeltrace1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
